Strategy Generation

Let AI create, test, and optimize TradingView Pine Script strategies automatically. Import your watchlist, set your targets, and watch the magic happen.

Start Free Learn More

How It Works

A fully autonomous agent that generates, backtests, and iteratively improves trading strategies

Set Your Targets

Define your desired win rate, profit factor, and max drawdown. The AI will optimize toward your goals.

Import Watchlist

Paste a TradingView watchlist URL or upload a CSV. We'll parse your symbols automatically.

AI Generation

DeepSeek R1 or Claude generates Pine Script strategies, backtests them, and iterates based on results.

Why Use AI Backtesting?

Save Hundreds of Hours

What takes traders weeks of manual testing happens in minutes.

Continuous Improvement

The AI learns from each backtest and iteratively improves the strategy.

Your Keys, Your Control

You provide your own API keys and TradingView cookies. We never store them unencrypted.

Win Rate68.4%
Profit Factor2.34
Max Drawdown12.1%

Example strategy metrics after 5 iterations
